auth.title: Login / Sign up
auth.forgotHelp: You will receive an email with a link to set a new password.
auth.acceptRequired: Please accept the Terms and Terms of use
auth.acceptPrefix: I have read and accept the

legal.termsP1: African Connect is a community platform designed to make it easier for members to connect (forum, groups, ads, jobs, events).
legal.termsP2: By using the service, you agree in particular to:
legal.termsL1: publish accurate information and respect other users;
legal.termsL2: not publish illegal, hateful, defamatory, harassing, or sexually explicit content;
legal.termsL4: not attempt to exploit vulnerabilities, bypass security, or disrupt the service.
legal.termsP3: We may, at our discretion, moderate, remove or limit access to content/accounts in case of abuse to protect the community.
legal.conditionsS1L1: You are responsible for keeping your password confidential and for actions performed through your account.
legal.conditionsS1L2: You can delete your account from your profile. Some data may remain in technical backups for a limited time.
legal.conditionsS2L1: You remain the owner of your content, but you authorize us to display it on the platform.
legal.conditionsS2L2: Content may be moderated (removed/hidden) if it violates rules or is reported.
legal.conditionsS3L1: Advertising requests and media may be reviewed before publication.
legal.conditionsS3L2: In case of non-compliance (copyright, prohibited content, etc.), a new version may be requested.
legal.conditionsS4P1: The service is provided “as is”. We do our best to ensure availability, without guaranteeing it will be uninterrupted.
